title: Lyra-1 Training Utilities and Config System

classes.name: LazyCall
classes.notes: Wraps callable; __call__ returns DictConfig with _target_ key. LazyDict = DictConfig (type alias)

classes.name: LazyConfig
methods: load_rel(filename: str, keys)  # relative to caller
classes.notes: Static methods only. Uses _patch_import() context manager for relative imports in .py configs.

classes.name: Model
methods: training_step(data_batch: dict, iteration: int) -> tuple[dict, Tensor]  # abstract
validation_step(data_batch: dict, iteration: int) -> tuple[dict, Tensor]  # abstract
classes.notes: Has optional 'ema' attribute (EMAModelTracker or FastEmaModelUpdater) set externally

classes.name: Trainer
methods: train(model: Model, dataloader_train: DataLoader, dataloader_val: DataLoader) -> None
classes.notes: Sets up distributed env, cuDNN, callbacks, checkpointer in __init__. Saves config as pkl+yaml.

classes.name: CallBackGroup
methods: __getattr__(method_name: str) -> Callable  # dispatches to all callbacks
classes.notes: Instantiates callbacks from config.trainer.callbacks (LazyDict). Proxies all method calls to each Callback.

classes.name: Callback
classes.notes: Base class; all methods are no-ops. config/trainer injected by CallBackGroup after instantiation.

classes.name: EMAModelCallback
methods: on_training_step_end(model, data_batch, output_batch, loss, iteration)  # model.ema.update_average(model, iteration)

classes.name: IterationLoggerCallback
methods: on_training_step_end(...)  # logs avg iter time every logging_iter steps

classes.name: GradClipCallback
methods: on_before_optimizer_step(model_ddp, optimizer, scheduler, grad_scaler, iteration)  # unscale + clip_grad_norm_

classes.name: LowPrecisionCallback
methods: on_training_step_start(model, data, iteration)  # casts data to precision_type
on_before_zero_grad(...)  # syncs master weights every update_iter steps

classes.name: FastEmaModelUpdater
methods: update_average(src_model, tgt_model, beta=0.9999) -> None  # foreach_mul + foreach_add
classes.notes: Does NOT maintain EMA buffers; expects two separate modules. Designed for FSDP.

classes.name: EMAModelTracker
methods: __init__(model: Model, beta=0.9999, torch_compile_buffer_renaming=False)  # registers param buffers
update_average(model: Model, iteration) -> None  # @no_grad, foreach_mul + foreach_add
initialize_multi_rank_ema(cls, model, rate, num, enabled) -> Optional[EMAModelTracker]  # classmethod
classes.notes: EMA weights stored as registered buffers (param name with '.' replaced by '-')

classes.name: PowerEMATracker
attributes: exp: float  # computed from s via polynomial roots
methods: update_average(model: Model, iteration)  # computes beta = (1-1/i)^(exp+1), then super()
initialize_multi_rank_ema(cls, model, rate, num, enabled) -> Optional[PowerEMATracker]  # classmethod
classes.notes: EDM2 power-EMA schedule. beta dynamically computed each iteration.

key_relationships: TrainerConfig holds callbacks: LazyDict (deferred instantiation of Callback subclasses)
CallBackGroup aggregates Callback[] (instantiated from LazyDict via instantiate())
Model optionally holds ema: EMAModelTracker | FastEmaModelUpdater
LazyCall produces LazyDict (DictConfig) entries consumed by CallBackGroup via instantiate()
LazyConfig uses LazyCall internally; load/save Config objects
important_notes: make_freezable is a decorator adding freeze() + setattr guard to attrs classes; requires slots=False
LazyDict is a type alias for omegaconf.DictConfig; LazyCall wraps callables for deferred instantiation
LazyConfig.load supports .py and .yaml; .py uses _patch_import() for safe relative imports
EMAConfig is a plain config dataclass; actual EMA tracking done by EMAModelTracker/FastEmaModelUpdater/PowerEMATracker
FastEmaModelUpdater is preferred for FSDP; EMAModelTracker/PowerEMATracker register buffers (suited for DDP)
ema_scope() context manager: cache regular weights → copy EMA → yield → restore regular weights
Callback instances have config+trainer injected by CallBackGroup (not constructor) to avoid deprecation
TrainerConfig default callbacks include EMAModelCallback and ProgressBarCallback via LazyCall
PowerEMATracker beta is dynamically recomputed per iteration: beta = (1-1/i)^(exp+1) from EDM2 paper
